mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, question_id AS questionId, answer, checkin_date AS checkinDate FROM symptom_checkins WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND checkin_date = #{checkinDate} ORDER BY question_id ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO symptom_checkins ( user_id, question_id, answer, checkin_date ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{questionId}, #{answer}, #{checkinDate} )
